element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary weapon throughout game; always available after weapon loss
Obtained from pill box sensors or red-clad guards in bases
Critical for horizontal level optimization; requires pattern management
Unique trajectory for specialized enemy patterns
Essential for avoiding fire and hitting low targets; immediately practiced
Core control; includes downward aiming while jumping
Foundation perspective; introduces basic enemy patterns
Pseudo-3D perspective; requires shooting generators to deactivate electric barriers; introduces time pressure
Gun defaults upward; focus on destroying defense system before exposing boss
Changes from horizontal to vertical movement patterns
Complex multi-segment enemy; HP drops 1 per frame max; segment spawning staggered
Map display shows time remaining; forces speed and routing decisions
Downward input drops from higher platforms; jump glitch available in Stage 3

typical_relief_triggers: Time pressure lifted in narrative transition
Fixed-screen boss completion revealing next path
typical_tension_triggers: Entering 3D base stage with active time limit
Generator sequences requiring precision under fire
Boss phase transitions with new attack patterns
Weapon loss after death (revert to default rifle)
Gromaides arm extension sequences spawning segments
Electric barriers blocking passage in base corridors
Bottomless pit visibility at stage boundaries
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity: jungle infiltration intro → base penetration with time pressure → boss gauntlets → vertical navigation challenges → final stronghold assault. Each stage perspective shift resets player comfort level, forcing tactical readjustment.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Pill box sensors and flying capsules contain weapons; destruction optional but strategically valuable
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Destroying red-clad guards in bases yields weapon drops; hidden level select and sound test accessible via cheat code

difficulty_curve.early_game: Jungle stage establishes baseline enemy patterns and weapon types; introduces crouching and multi-directional aiming in safe context
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Base 1 (Stages 2-3) introduces time pressure, 3D perspective navigation, and first major boss (Gromaides); fixed-screen stage forces tactical position management
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 4-8 escalate enemy density and boss complexity; vertical-scrolling stage (Waterfall) introduces new spatial challenge; final stronghold stage with progressive defense system destruction
notable_spikes: Stage 2 entry: sudden introduction of time limit and 3D perspective shift
Stage 3: Gromaides boss complexity (multi-segment linked-list behavior; staggered spawn timing)
Stage 4: perspective shift to vertical scrolling after horizontal/3D stages
Final stage: accumulated enemy types and boss pattern variety

notable_level_patterns.description: Stage 1 establishes foundational mechanics: side-scrolling perspective, enemy encounters, weapon pick-ups, reaching base entrance via sensor destruction. Safe introduction context allows weapon type exploration.

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Base Interior 3D Navigation with Time Pressure
notable_level_patterns.description: Stage 2 switches to pseudo-3D isometric view where player shoots and moves toward background. Generator destruction in each passageway deactivates electric barriers. Time display at top creates tension. Requires route optimization.

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Fixed-Screen Boss Arena with Upward Default Aim
notable_level_patterns.description: Stage 3 core uses fixed-screen perspective with gun defaulting upward. Player must destroy defense system (eyeball boss shooting fireballs) to expose final target. Gromaides boss: 10-segment arms in linked-list structure; segments spawn staggered every 16 frames.

Stage 4 inverts spatial expectation with vertical upward scrolling (waterfall/cliff setting). Introduces bottom-to-top movement mechanics after horizontal/3D stages. Enemy placement patterns adapted for vertical navigation.

Certain level types favor specific weapons: Spread Gun optimized for horizontal levels (5-direction coverage); single-target weapons (Laser) for 3D corridor navigation. RNG-dependent random enemy spawns require adaptive weapon selection.

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Boss HP Damage Gating (1 HP per Frame Max)
notable_level_patterns.description: All bosses limited to 1 HP loss per frame regardless of bullet volume. Strategy shifts from DPS maximization to consistent damage-per-frame delivery. Gromaides requires continuous arm segment targeting.
